summary: Iteration_12 testing of 3 new shipments: (a) admin metrics dashboard at /admin/voice-metrics, (b) hero copy rewrite to 'Say what you mean — clearly.', (c) opt-in public share with PII redaction at /v/{shareId}. Backend: 14/14 new tests PASS in /app/backend/tests/test_voice_share_metrics.py + 21/21 regression PASS in test_voice_messaging.py (35/35 overall, ~42s). Frontend: hero copy verified (new text present, old removed), share modal end-to-end works (Share button on each tone card → modal warning 'this understands creates a public link…' → Create-share button DISABLED before checkbox, ENABLED after → click → POST /share → toast 'Share link copied to clipboard' → button label changes to '🔗 Link copied · copy again'), public /v/{shareId} renders side-by-side 'WHAT I SAID' vs 'WHAT WE SENT' with watermark 'OPTIMIZED WITH AICLONECHATS.COM VOICE', CTA 'Open the studio →', and NO main navbar (only minimal header with logo + Copy link). /v/{nonexistent} renders 'Not found' card cleanly. Admin metrics dashboard renders all sections — north-star copy-rate (8.1%), 7-stage funnel with drop %, tone copy-rate table with 'BEST · APOLOGY · 50.0%' / 'WEAKEST · NEGOTIATION · 0.0%' tags, trust-signals card, source split, 24h/7d/30d switcher works. Backend confirmed: PII redactor catches phone+email+url+card categories on a real PII-laden share creation; idempotency holds (same message_id → same share_id); ownership check blocks foreign device_id (404); DELETE removes public access (subsequent GET 404); public GET requires no auth, increments view_count, emits voice_share_viewed event with experience_variant='voice_v1'; metrics endpoint returns 401 unauth, 403 non-admin, 200 with full payload for admin (window_days=7, 7-stage funnel, north_star, tone_performance.best/worst with copy_rate ordering invariant, trust_signals.edit_before_copy_pct, actors{anonymous|authed|conversion}, retention{d1, 2nd_gen_same_day}, daily_active_actors).
critical_code_review_comments: /app/backend/voice.py line 707: duplicate `return {"ok": True}` after the first one (unreachable). Cosmetic dead code — remove the second line.

pii_redact.py: the OTP regex `\b(?:OTP|otp|code|pin|verification)\D{0,6}(\d{4,8})\b` only captures the digits via group(1) but the `subn` replacement substitutes the WHOLE match — so the keyword 'OTP is' also gets redacted. That's actually safer (the intent is to scrub the surrounding context too), but worth a code comment so a future developer doesn't 'fix' it.

pii_redact.py: card pattern `\b(?:\d[ -]*?){13,19}\b` is greedy across spaces and may over-redact a long phone-like sequence on a slow line; ordering puts card BEFORE phone which is correct, but a 12-digit string would still match the 13–19 quantifier ONLY if 13+ digits actually present. Acceptable conservative trade-off.
voice_metrics.py O(N*M) hot path at line 117: `for actor … for e in events` — fine at 50k cap but if the window grows, switch to a single pass building gens_by_(actor,day) dict. Not a bug today.

AdminVoiceMetrics.jsx percentages can render >100% (e.g. funnel 'Input started 150%' visible in screenshot when input_started > viewed). That's data-correct (events are independent), but the bar capping at 100% would communicate the funnel intent better. Minor visual polish.

success_rate.frontend: 100% — share flow + public page + admin metrics + hero copy all verified

seed_data_creation: Created one PII-laden voice session + share (auto-cleaned by delete_share test). Created one regression share v979793aea5 for /v/{shareId} UI verification (left in DB, harmless). Reset voice_daily_count for sr-tester at start of pytest run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All three new shipments verified end-to-end. Backend regression file /app/backend/tests/test_voice_share_metrics.py covers share + metrics + redact (14 tests, ~8s). Pre-existing /app/backend/tests/test_voice_messaging.py still 21/21 green; the only spec change was /track now also accepts voice_share_warning_shown/dismissed (covered by new TestTrackShareEvents). Two cosmetic items if main agent wants polish: (1) remove duplicate `return {"ok": True}` at voice.py:707; (2) consider capping AdminVoiceMetrics funnel bar widths at 100% even when an event-based stage exceeds the top stage. Neither is a bug.
rca of the issue: No bugs found this iteration. Implementation matches the spec point-by-point: confirmation gate (400 without confirmed=true), PII redaction (phone/email/url all scrubbed in the stored share doc and in the API response's redacted_categories), idempotency (same share_id on repeat POST, voice_share_reused event emitted), ownership isolation (foreign device_id → 404), public GET (no auth, increments view_count, emits voice_share_viewed with experience_variant='voice_v1'), DELETE removes public access. Admin metrics gating works: 401 unauth, 403 non-admin, 200 admin with the full documented payload shape and best/worst tone ordering invariant holding.
